response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with deep experience across web, mobile, and developer tooling (test runners, CI infrastructure, MCP code generators), but the role is a Level II people-management position requiring at least 2 years of formal people management and 3 years of technical leadership. The resume shows no direct reports, performance management, or organizational-change leadership; leadership evidence is limited to founding an open-source project, running workshops, and mentoring through dojos. Technical fit is partial, but the core management requirement is unmet.
strengths: Hands-on developer-tooling experience: authored test frameworks (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD setup, and AI-agent developer tooling
15+ years of broad software development experience spanning web, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Demonstrated teaching and mentorship inclination via workshops, courses, and community talks
concerns: No formal people-management experience (one-on-ones, performance reviews, team development)
No evidence of organizational-change leadership or strategic roadmap ownership at team/org level
Mobile-platform experience is limited to a brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-2016, not ecosystem-scale tooling

key_factors.factor: Developer tools and testing infrastructure background
Lack of demonstrated technical leadership at organizational scope
